title: Unified Zod Validation Error i18n System

tasks.title: Add defaultHook to createRouter() in create-app.ts
tasks.description:
Fix the API validation response format bug. In `apps/api/src/utils/create-app.ts`, add a `defaultHook` to the `OpenAPIHono` constructor in `createRouter()`. The hook calls `transformZodError(result.error)` when validation fails and returns the standard API envelope `{ success, error: { code, message, details }, metadata }`. Import `transformZodError` from `./zod-error-transformer`. Also check if `createApp()` creates a separate `OpenAPIHono` instance that needs the same hook.

Files: `apps/api/src/utils/create-app.ts`
Tests: Task T-002 covers this.

subtasks.title: Add defaultHook to createRouter() OpenAPIHono constructor
Check if createApp() also needs the hook
Verify hook returns undefined on success

tasks.title: Write tests for defaultHook validation behavior
tasks.description:
Create test file `apps/api/test/utils/create-app.test.ts`. Test cases:
1. Route with invalid request body returns HTTP 400 with standard envelope
2. Response has `success: false`
3. Response has `error.code === 'VALIDATION_ERROR'`
4. Response has `error.details.details[]` array with field-level info
5. Response has `error.details.summary` with error counts
6. Valid request still returns expected success response
7. Route with per-route hook uses that hook instead of defaultHook

Files: `apps/api/test/utils/create-app.test.ts` (new)

subtasks.title: Create test file with test setup (OpenAPIHono route)
Test invalid body returns 400 with standard envelope
Test response structure (success, error.code, details, summary)
Test valid request passes through normally

tasks.title: Verify defaultHook with existing admin route (manual/integration)
tasks.description:
Send invalid request to an existing admin route (e.g., POST `/api/v1/admin/amenities` with empty body). Confirm HTTP 400 with standard envelope format. Confirm existing passing requests still work. This can be a manual test or a lightweight integration test.

Files: N/A (manual verification or add to T-002 test file)

subtasks.title: Test invalid POST to admin route returns envelope format

tasks.title: Create zodError key extraction script
tasks.description:
Create `scripts/extract-zod-keys.ts` that scans:
- `packages/schemas/src/**/*.ts`
- `apps/api/src/types/validation-messages.ts`
- `apps/api/src/schemas/base-schemas.ts`
- `apps/api/src/routes/exchange-rates/admin/index.ts`

Extraction logic:
1. Regex to find all `zodError.{...}` string literals
2. For template literals in `http-field.factory.ts`: resolve field names (minPrice, maxPrice, minGuests, maxGuests, latitude, longitude, checkIn, checkOut, isActive, isFeatured, distance)
3. Output `scripts/zod-keys-inventory.json` with keys array, total count, byNamespace breakdown, dynamicKeys, and warnings

Files: `scripts/extract-zod-keys.ts` (new), `scripts/zod-keys-inventory.json` (output)
Tests: Run script and verify output has ~1,037 keys.

subtasks.title: Create script with regex-based key extraction
Handle template literal resolution for http-field.factory.ts
Generate JSON output with keys, counts, namespaces, warnings
Run script and verify ~1,037 keys extracted

tasks.title: Generate Spanish validation.json translations
tasks.description:
Create `packages/i18n/src/locales/es/validation.json` using the inventory from T-004. For each key:
1. Strip `zodError.` prefix to get JSON path
2. Apply translation pattern from spec section 4.3 based on validation type
3. Use Spanish field names (name->nombre, email->email, slug->slug, displayWeight->peso de visualizacion)
4. Use {{min}}, {{max}} interpolation placeholders
5. Include BOTH camelCase and underscore variants for base-schemas.ts keys
6. Use accented characters (obligatorio, invalido)
7. Include 23 generic `field.*` keys (tooSmall, tooLarge, invalidType, etc.)

Expected size: ~1,500-2,000 lines.

Files: `packages/i18n/src/locales/es/validation.json` (new)
Tests: Verify every key from inventory has a translation entry.

subtasks.title: Generate nested JSON structure from key inventory
Verify all inventory keys have translations

tasks.title: Create EN/PT placeholder validation.json files
tasks.description:
Create placeholder files:
- `packages/i18n/src/locales/en/validation.json`
- `packages/i18n/src/locales/pt/validation.json`

Same nested structure as ES file. Values prefixed with `[EN]` or `[PT]` respectively (e.g., `"[EN] Name is required"`, `"[PT] O nome e obrigatorio"`). Purpose: prevent `[MISSING: ...]` errors for non-ES locales.

Files: `packages/i18n/src/locales/en/validation.json` (new), `packages/i18n/src/locales/pt/validation.json` (new)

subtasks.title: Create EN placeholder file with [EN] prefixed values
Create PT placeholder file with [PT] prefixed values
Verify same structure as ES file

tasks.title: Create resolveValidationMessage helper
tasks.description:
Create `packages/i18n/src/utils/resolve-validation-message.ts`. Create the `src/utils/` directory if it doesn't exist.

Function maps zodError/validationError keys to i18n keys:
- `zodError.amenity.name.min` -> `t('validation.amenity.name.min', params)`
- `validationError.field.tooSmall` -> `t('validation.field.tooSmall', params)`
- Other keys -> `t(key, params)` as-is
- Fallback: if translation returns `[MISSING: ...]`, return original key

Accepts generic `t: (key: string, params?) => string` (not TranslationKey typed).

Export from `packages/i18n/src/index.ts`.

Files: `packages/i18n/src/utils/resolve-validation-message.ts` (new), `packages/i18n/src/index.ts` (modify)
Tests: T-011 covers this.

tasks.title: Register validation namespace in i18n config
tasks.description:
In `packages/i18n/src/config.ts`:
1. Add `'validation'` to `namespaces` array
2. Add 3 static imports: `validationEs`, `validationEn`, `validationPt` from locale files
3. Add to `rawTranslations` object under each locale: `validation: validationEs/En/Pt`

Files: `packages/i18n/src/config.ts` (modify)
Tests: T-009 verifies types are generated correctly.

subtasks.title: Add to rawTranslations for es, en, pt

tasks.title: Regenerate i18n types and verify
tasks.description:
Run `cd packages/i18n && pnpm generate-types` to regenerate the `TranslationKey` union type. Verify that `packages/i18n/src/types.ts` now includes `validation.*` keys. File will grow significantly (~1,037 new keys). Run `pnpm typecheck` in packages/i18n to confirm compilation.

Files: `packages/i18n/src/types.ts` (auto-generated)
Tests: typecheck pass is the verification.

tasks.title: Validate i18n integration end-to-end (Phase 1 smoke test)
tasks.description:
Write a quick smoke test or manual verification that:
1. `useTranslations('es')` can resolve `validation.amenity.name.required` to a Spanish string
2. `resolveValidationMessage({ key: 'zodError.amenity.name.min', t, params: { min: 2 } })` returns interpolated Spanish string
3. Missing key fallback works

This validates the entire Phase 1 pipeline: JSON -> config -> namespace -> helper -> translated string.

Files: Can be part of T-011 test file or a standalone verification.

subtasks.title: Verify key resolution through full pipeline

tasks.title: Write tests for resolveValidationMessage
tasks.description:
Create `packages/i18n/test/utils/resolve-validation-message.test.ts`. Test cases:
1. `zodError.amenity.name.min` -> calls `t('validation.amenity.name.min')`
2. `validationError.field.tooSmall` -> calls `t('validation.field.tooSmall')`
3. Arbitrary key without prefix -> calls `t(key)` as-is
4. Params interpolation -> passes params to `t()`
5. Missing translation fallback -> returns original key when `t()` returns `[MISSING: ...]`
6. Empty string key -> returns empty string
7. Key with underscore naming -> `zodError.common.id.invalid_uuid` -> calls `t('validation.common.id.invalid_uuid')`

Use mock `t` function.

Files: `packages/i18n/test/utils/resolve-validation-message.test.ts` (new)

subtasks.title: Create test file with mock t function

tasks.title: Update transformZodError to prefer schema message keys
tasks.description:
In `apps/api/src/utils/zod-error-transformer.ts`, modify the error transformation logic. When building `TransformedValidationError`, check if `err.message` starts with `zodError.`:
- If yes: use `err.message` as the `message` field (primary translation key)
- If no: fall back to generic key from `ZOD_ERROR_MESSAGE_MAP`

Current behavior: `message` always comes from `ZOD_ERROR_MESSAGE_MAP`, `translatedMessage` has the schema key.
New behavior: if schema provides a `zodError.*` key, use it as `message`.

Backward compatible: routes not using `zodError.*` messages still get generic keys.

Files: `apps/api/src/utils/zod-error-transformer.ts` (modify)
Tests: T-013 covers this.

subtasks.title: Add zodError.* prefix check on err.message
Use schema key as message when present
Keep generic fallback for non-zodError messages

tasks.title: Write tests for transformer schema key preference
tasks.description:
In `apps/api/test/utils/zod-error-transformer.test.ts`, add test cases:
1. When Zod error has `zodError.*` message, it appears as `message` field
2. When Zod error has no `zodError.*` message, falls back to `ZOD_ERROR_MESSAGE_MAP` generic key
3. Existing tests continue passing unchanged

Files: `apps/api/test/utils/zod-error-transformer.test.ts` (modify or create)

subtasks.title: Test zodError.* message used as primary message field
Test fallback to ZOD_ERROR_MESSAGE_MAP when no zodError.* prefix

tasks.title: Create schema registry (entity type to Zod schema mapping)
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/lib/validation/schema-registry.ts`. Import all 24 schemas (12 create + 12 update) from `@repo/schemas`. Implement `getEntitySchema({ entityType, mode })` that returns the appropriate ZodSchema or undefined for unknown types.

Entity types: accommodation, amenity, feature, attraction, destination, event, eventLocation, eventOrganizer, post, sponsor, tag, user.
Modes: 'create' returns CreateInputSchema, 'edit' returns UpdateInputSchema.

Files: `apps/admin/src/lib/validation/schema-registry.ts` (new)
Tests: T-020 covers this.

tasks.title: Create Zod validation helpers (validateFormWithZod, validateFieldWithZod, extractZodIssueParams)
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/lib/validation/validate-form.ts` with three functions:

1. `extractZodIssueParams(issue: ZodIssue)`: Extract min, max, expected, received, multipleOf from Zod issues for interpolation.

2. `validateFormWithZod({ schema, data, t })`: Unflatten dot-notation form data, run safeParse, return Record<fieldId, translatedError>. Uses resolveValidationMessage for each issue.

3. `validateFieldWithZod({ schema, data, fieldId, t })`: Same as above but returns error only for target field.

Import `unflattenValues` from entity-form utils, `resolveValidationMessage` from `@repo/i18n`.

Files: `apps/admin/src/lib/validation/validate-form.ts` (new)
Tests: T-019 covers this.

subtasks.title: Implement extractZodIssueParams with all Zod issue subtypes
Add JSDoc to all three functions

tasks.title: Integrate Zod validation into EntityFormProvider
tasks.description:
Modify `apps/admin/src/components/entity-form/providers/EntityFormProvider.tsx`:
1. Accept optional `zodSchema?: ZodSchema` prop
2. Get `t` from `useTranslations()` hook, cast to `(key: string, params?) => string`
3. In `validateForm()` (~line 142): if zodSchema provided, call `validateFormWithZod({ schema, data, t })`; else fall back to existing required-field check
4. In `validateField()` (~line 221): if zodSchema provided, call `validateFieldWithZod({ schema, data, fieldId, t })`; else return undefined
5. Wire validation into submit: `handleSave()` (~line 174) MUST call `validateForm()` BEFORE save handler. If errors: setErrors, show toast, scroll to first error, return early. Same for `handleSaveAndPublish()`.
6. Remove all 4 TODO comments (lines 60, 151, 199, 221)

Files: `apps/admin/src/components/entity-form/providers/EntityFormProvider.tsx` (modify)
Tests: T-021 covers integration tests.

subtasks.title: Add useTranslations hook and cast t
Wire validateForm into handleSave before API call

tasks.title: Update EntityCreateContent to use resolveValidationMessage and pass zodSchema
tasks.description:
Modify `apps/admin/src/components/entity-pages/EntityCreateContent.tsx`:
1. Remove `formatZodErrorMessage()` function entirely (lines 25-45)
2. Import `resolveValidationMessage` and `useTranslations` from `@repo/i18n`
3. Cast `t` for validation: `const tAny = t as (key: string, params?) => string`
4. In the catch block (lines 217-237): replace `formatZodErrorMessage(message)` with `resolveValidationMessage({ key: message, t: tAny })`
5. Accept optional `zodSchema` prop and pass through to `EntityFormProvider`

Files: `apps/admin/src/components/entity-pages/EntityCreateContent.tsx` (modify)

subtasks.title: Add imports for resolveValidationMessage and useTranslations
Replace error formatting in catch block
Add zodSchema prop and pass to EntityFormProvider

tasks.title: Write unit tests for validateFormWithZod and extractZodIssueParams
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/test/lib/validation/validate-form.test.ts`. Test cases:

validateFormWithZod:
1. Valid data returns empty error map
2. Missing required field returns translated error
3. Multiple validation errors return multiple entries
4. Nested field paths produce dot-notation IDs (price.basePrice)
5. Extra keys in data are ignored
6. Update schema (.partial()) allows missing fields

validateFieldWithZod:
7. Returns error only for target field
8. Returns undefined when target field is valid

extractZodIssueParams:
9. too_small issue extracts { min }
10. too_big issue extracts { max }
11. invalid_type issue extracts { expected, received }
12. Issue with no extras returns {}
13. End-to-end: schema -> issue -> params -> translation with {{min}}

Files: `apps/admin/test/lib/validation/validate-form.test.ts` (new)

subtasks.title: Create test file with test schemas
Test extractZodIssueParams for each issue type
